post.description: OAuth2 compatible token login, get an access token for future requests
Create new user without the need to be logged in.

get.description: Get a specific user by id.
Retrieve maps sorted by update dates
Retrieve datasets sorted by update dates, filtered by user permissions

post.description:
Create staging dataset from file upload.
Validates and loads data to data.st_{table_name}.

get.description: Get dataset by ID with geometry information.

Get dataset data by dataset ID.

Args:
    id: Dataset UUID
    formatType: Format of returned data ('geojson' for GeoJSON FeatureCollection, 'raw' for array of records)

Returns:
    GeoJSON FeatureCollection or raw data array depending on formatType

post.description:
Process a chat request and return a chat response.

Args:
    chat_request (ChatRequest): The chat request data.
    conversation_id: The conversation id.

Returns:
    ChatResponse: The chat response.

data.description: The GeoJSON data for the new layer

AddNewLayerAction.title: AddNewLayerAction
AddNewLayerAction.description:
Action to add a new layer to the map.

Attributes:
    action_name: Set to 'add_new_layer'.
    geojson: The GeoJSON data for the new layer.
    layer_name: Optional human-readable name for the layer.
    style: Optional styling configuration for the layer.

messages.description: List of messages in the conversation

thread_id.title: Thread Id
thread_id.description: Thread ID to persist and continue a multi-turn conversation.

map_id.title: Map Id
map_id.description: The map ID the conversation is associated with.

Request model for chat endpoint.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: List of messages in the conversation

thread_id.title: Thread Id
thread_id.description: Thread ID to persist and continue a multi-turn conversation.

span_id.title: Span Id
span_id.description: The root span ID for tracing purposes

actions.title: Actions
actions.description: List of actions to be communicated to the frontend

ChatResponse.title: ChatResponse
ChatResponse.description:
Response model for chat endpoint.

Attributes:
    messages: List of messages in the conversation.
    thread_id: The thread ID for continuing the conversation.
    span_id: The root span ID for tracing purposes.
    actions: List of actions to be communicated to the frontend.

Message model for chat endpoint.

level.title: Level
level.description: The severity level of the notification

ShowNotificationAction.title: ShowNotificationAction
ShowNotificationAction.description:
Action to show a notification to the user.

Attributes:
    action_name: Set to 'show_notification'.
    message: The notification message to display.
    level: The severity level of the notification (e.g., 'info', 'warning', 'error').
